title: Issue related to clock gating signal with latch

features.name: latch with incomplete sensitivity list for clock gating
features.description: Code should include a latch module with sensitivity list containing only clk and d (without explicit wildcard), used in clock gating feedback path

features.name: verilator clock_enable annotation on gated clock wire
features.description: Code should include a wire with /* verilator clock_enable */ annotation that is itself a gated clock (result of clock AND enable signal)
features.snippet:
wire [127:0] gclk_vld /* verilator clock_enable */;
assign gclk_vld = {128{clk}} & ff_en_vld;

features.name: clock gating via assign with replication operator
features.description: Code should include a clock gating assignment using replication operator to create wide AND of clock and enable

features.name: feedback path from gated clock through latch to enable signal
features.description: Code should include a gated clock used to clock a latch whose output is used to create the enable signal that gates that same clock

features.name: flop with gated clock and vector data input
features.description: Code should include a flip-flop module with gated clock and vector data input where data is extracted from sliced vector
